financeContent.title: Financial
financeContent.subtitle: Revenue, costs, results and opportunities for the period
financeContent.fixedCostsWarning: Fixed costs are being prorated for the selected period ({days} day(s) of 30). To view the full monthly P&L, select a 30-day period.
financeContent.plDescription: The P&L calculates the actual financial result of the business from collected payment events.
financeContent.segmentedVariableCostsDescription: Each variable cost can be configured to apply only to the revenue of a specific payment method or billing type. Configure your costs in

grossRevenue.label: Gross Revenue
grossRevenue.desc: Total gross of confirmed payments in the period.

discounts.label: − Discounts
discounts.desc: Coupons and discounts sent via the discount field in the payment event.

variableCosts.label: − Variable Costs
variableCosts.desc: Percentages configured on the platform (taxes, commissions, etc.) applied to revenue.

operatingProfit.label: = Operating Profit
operatingProfit.desc: Result after discounts and configured variable costs.

fixedCosts.label: − Fixed Costs
fixedCosts.desc: Fixed monthly values configured on the platform, prorated proportionally to the period.

netProfit.label: = Net Profit
netProfit.desc: What actually remained after all costs are deducted.

kpiCards.recurringTooltip: Revenue from subscriptions and recurring charges in the period.
kpiCards.oneTimeTooltip: Revenue from single purchases, not linked to subscriptions.
kpiCards.averageTicketTooltip: Average value per transaction in the period. Calculated as Gross Revenue ÷ number of payments.
kpiCards.discountsTooltip: Total value of coupons and discounts applied to payments in the period. Reduces net revenue.
kpiCards.variableCostsTooltip: Costs that grow proportionally to revenue — such as gateway fees, commissions, and taxes. Calculated as a percentage of gross revenue.
kpiCards.fixedCostsTooltip: Monthly expenses that don't vary with revenue — such as tools, salaries, and rent. Prorated proportionally when the period is less than a month.
kpiCards.operatingProfitTooltip: Gross Revenue minus discounts and variable costs. Shows operational health before fixed costs.
kpiCards.netProfitTooltip: What's left after deducting all costs (variable + fixed + discounts) from gross revenue. This is the actual profit for the period.
kpiCards.netMarginTooltip: Percentage of gross revenue that converts to net profit. Above 20% is considered healthy for SaaS.

revenueChart.title: Daily Result Evolution
revenueChart.subtitle: Gross revenue, operating profit and net profit for the selected period

profitLossWaterfall.title: Result Composition
profitLossWaterfall.subtitle: Revenue → Discounts → Variable Costs → Operating Profit → Fixed Costs → Net Profit

profitLossCards.grossRevenueTooltip: Total payments received in the period, before any discounts or costs. It's the top line of the income statement.
profitLossCards.variableCostsTooltip: Sum of costs that vary with revenue — gateway fees, commissions, sales taxes. Configured as % of gross revenue.
profitLossCards.operatingProfitTooltip: Gross Revenue minus variable costs. Represents what's left before paying fixed monthly expenses.
profitLossCards.fixedCostsTooltip: Monthly expenses independent of sales volume. When the period is less than 30 days, the value is prorated proportionally.
profitLossCards.netProfitTooltip: What actually remains in the cash flow after deducting all costs. Negative means the business is spending more than it earns.
profitLossCards.netMarginTooltip: Net Profit divided by Gross Revenue, as a percentage. A margin above 20% is considered healthy for SaaS.

costsContent.title: Manage Costs
costsContent.subtitle: Register fixed and variable costs to calculate the P&L in Financial

fixedCosts.title: Fixed Costs
fixedCosts.subtitle: Constant expenses — server, salary, tools
fixedCosts.emptyDescription: Fixed costs are constant expenses like servers, salaries, and tools.

variableCosts.title: Variable Costs
variableCosts.subtitle: Revenue percentages — taxes, commissions and fees
variableCosts.emptyDescription: Variable costs are revenue percentages such as taxes, commissions, and gateway fees.

costForm.variableDescription: Percentage applied to the period's revenue. Use for taxes, commissions, and gateway fees.
costForm.fixedDescription: Fixed value automatically prorated according to the selected period.
costForm.categoryHint: Must match exactly the category field sent in payment events.

costComposition.title: Cost Composition
costComposition.subtitle: Visual proportion of costs over the current month's revenue
costComposition.subtitleWithValue: Visual proportion of costs over the current month's revenue ({value})

costsImpact.fixedTooltip: Sum of monthly expenses that do not vary with revenue — tools, salaries, rent, services. Paid regardless of sales volume.
costsImpact.variableTooltip: Costs calculated as a percentage of revenue — gateway fees, marketplace commissions, taxes. Grow proportionally to sales.
costsImpact.totalTooltip: Sum of all costs in the period (fixed + variable). This is the total that must be covered by revenue for the business to be profitable.
costsImpact.marginImpactTooltip: Percentage of gross revenue consumed by total costs. Above 50% is concerning — it means more than half of what comes in already goes to expenses.
costsImpact.grossTooltip: Total gross received in the reference month, used as the base to calculate the percentage impact of costs.

aiAnalysis.title: AI Analysis
aiAnalysis.subtitle: Gemini analyzes your costs and identifies improvement opportunities
aiAnalysis.apiKeyError: Error getting analysis. Check your GEMINI_API_KEY configuration.
